metadata.title: LeanTek Learning - Master Modern Tech
metadata.description: Transform your career with hands-on courses in AI, cloud, and modern development.

hero.headline: Master the Tech That Powers the Future
hero.subheadline: Hands-on courses in artificial intelligence, cloud architecture, and modern development. Built by engineers, for engineers.

courses.title: Explore Our Tracks
courses.subtitle: Curated learning paths designed to take you from fundamentals to production-ready skills.

ai.title: AI Engineering
ai.description: Build and deploy LLMs, agents, and ML pipelines.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture
cloud.description: Design scalable systems on AWS, GCP, and Azure.

features.title: Why LeanTek Learning?
features.subtitle: Everything you need to accelerate your engineering career.

handsOn.title: Hands-On Projects
handsOn.description: Build real applications, not toy examples. Every course includes production-grade projects.

mentorship.title: Expert Mentorship
mentorship.description: Get guidance from senior engineers who have shipped code at top tech companies.

community.title: Active Community
community.description: Join a community of learners. Pair program, review code, and grow together.

certification.title: Industry Certification
certification.description: Earn certificates recognized by hiring managers at leading technology companies.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Your journey from beginner to production-ready engineer in four simple steps.

1.title: Choose Your Track
1.description: Pick from AI Engineering, Cloud Architecture, or Modern Web Development based on your goals.

2.title: Learn by Building
2.description: Follow hands-on lessons where you build real projects, not just watch tutorials.

3.title: Get Mentored
3.description: Receive personalized feedback and guidance from senior engineers in weekly sessions.

4.title: Launch Your Career
4.description: Earn your certificate and get connected with hiring partners looking for your skills.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Engineers who transformed their careers with LeanTek Learning.

1.name: Sarah Chen
1.quote: The AI Engineering track gave me the practical skills I needed to land my dream job. The mentorship was invaluable.

2.name: Marcus Johnson
2.quote: I went from cloud basics to designing multi-region architectures. The hands-on projects made all the difference.

3.name: Elena Rodriguez
3.quote: The Modern Web Dev track is incredibly well structured. I built a production SaaS as my capstone project.

4.name: David Kim
4.quote: LeanTek gave me the confidence to leave my corporate job and build my own startup. Best investment ever.

cta.title: Ready to Level Up?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of engineers who are already building the future. Start your journey today.

footer.tagline: Engineering education for the modern era.
